case_title: OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. CHUER ZHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CHUER DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
